doctrine_note: Project bindings for the Shot/Storyboard agent. character_markers + scene_markers + style_anchor + prompt_rules are copied verbatim from the most-authoritative on-disk source (shot_list.json for the Grog MV; ANIM-04 scene bible for the scene). The agent does not parse character bibles for these strings.

grog_playground.song_title: too big for the playground (piano power Ballad) Remix
grog_playground.character_markers: massive ogre with warm beige skin and rugged texture, smooth clean-shaven face, warm brown eyes, teal roughspun vest, fraying rope belt, patched fringe brown trousers
grog_playground.scene_markers: A magical realm playground at sunset with weathered swings and a tall ornate carousel under red and orange evening summer sky, soft warm light catching painted wood, calm wide framing
grog_playground.style_anchor: Pixar 3D animated feature film, vibrant warm colours, smooth stylized CGI, expressive character design
grog_playground.prompt_rules: Subject in first 15 words. 30-80 words per kontext_prompt. No quality tags. No negation. Lighting described as interaction. Texture inline with subject. Style anchor once at end. Character identified by key visual markers not 'the same character'.
